#!/usr/bin/env pythonX.description: Shebang line for the first python in PATH

#!/usr/bin/env python3.description: Shebang line for default python 3 interpreter

pyright ignore line.description: Ignore specific line diagnostic in pyright (ignore all is unsafe)

Multiline string.description: Avoid autopair plugin annoyances when typing multiple "

One-line multiline string.description: Avoid autopair plugin annoyances when typing multiple "

if __name__ == __main__.description: Execute code if the file is executed directly

Jupyter markdown cell.description: Add a new REPL markdown cell

from ... import ....description: Import individual objects directly into the caller’s symbol table

body: from __future__ import absolute_import, division, print_function, unicode_literals
from future import ....description: Import future statement definitions for python2.x scripts using utf-8 as encoding.

body: from __future__ import absolute_import, division, print_function, unicode_literals
from future import ... v1.description: Import future statement definitions for python3.x scripts using utf-8 as encoding.

for w/ range.description: for loop that iterates over range of integers

dowhile.description: Code snippet to create a do-while loop structure.

case wildcard.description: case wildcard block if other cases fail

Property Template.description: New property: get and set via decorator

self.description: Snippet to reference the self property in an object

List comprehension.description: List comprehension for creating a list based on existing lists.

List comprehension if else.description: List comprehension for creating a list based on existing lists, with conditional if-else statement.

List comprehension if filter.description: List comprehension for creating a list based on existing lists, with conditional if statement.

Dictionary comprehension.description: Handy and faster way to create dictories based on existing dictionaries.

Dictionary comprehension if filter.description: Handy and faster way to create dictories based on existing dictionaries, with conditional if statement.

Set comprehension.description: Create a set based on existing iterables.

Set Comprehension if filter.description: Create a set based on existing iterables, with condition if statement.

Generator comprehension.description: Create a generator based on existing iterables.

Generator comprehension if filter.description: Create a generator based on existing iterables, with condition if statement.

comment.description: A Python docstring for functions and methods, including short summary, details, args, returns, and examples. This docstring is an synonym of """function.

comment simple.description: A simple Python docstring comment. Useful when you prefer to add the docstrings manually on functions.

module docstring.description: A Python docstring for modules, including a one-line summary, details, and example.

test module docstring.description:
Module-level docstrings for test files are not required. They should be included only when there is additional information that can be provided.

Examples include some specifics on how the test should be run, an explanation of an unusual setup pattern, dependency on the external environment, and so on. Docstrings that do not provide any new information should not be used, such as """Tests for foo.bar."""

function docstring.description: A Python docstring for functions and methods, including short summary, details, args, returns, and example.

function docstring typed.description: Alternative Python docstring for functions and methods, with a different type syntax. Some teams prefer it.

generator docstring.description: A Python docstring for generator methods, including a one-line summary, details, parameters, yields, and example. It is the same, but it has yields instead of returns.

class docstring.description: A Python docstring for classes, including a one-line summary, details, attributes, and returns.

exception docstring.description: A Python docstring for exceptions, including a one-line summary, description, and attributes.

raises docstring.description: A Python docstring for methods when we want to be exclicit about the errors it Raises. Use it only when is relevant.

# coding=utf-8.description: Set default python3 encoding specification to utf-8, by default this is the encoding for python3.x as it is mentioned in pep-3120.
